description: May and Bobbi pose as operatives at a Cayman Islands bank to search Strucker's safe deposit box. Their cover is almost blown by a tripped alarm, but Bobbi smoothly redirects the situation and they exit after retrieving Strucker's information. The scene features teamwork, spy-craft, and demonstrates Bobbi's growing confidence back in the field.

transcript.line: Ms. Wong would like to access her safe-deposit box. Here's her account number.
I will need your I.D.s, please.
Of course. (in Mandarin) Let's hope Fitz got these right.
Ms. Wong likes your tie.
Follow me.
Take as much time as you need.
Box 38.
Fitz, we need anything on Strucker, anything that will get us to Ward.
Yeah, getting it. Real-estate deeds, passport. No cash?
He must've cleared it all out. He...
Oh, uh, guys, I think you triggered an alarm somewhere.
Great.
How much time do we have?
Uh... Oh. Looks like zero.
What is happening in here?
My boss would like to congratulate you.
What?
Your security system is top-notch, and your team is incredibly efficient. Just what we'd hoped for.
We've been reading up on you.
Oh, I see where you're going with this. One second.
We'd like to offer you a job.
A job? This seems most unorthodox.
We were sent from your former employer, First Fiduciary National, and they would like you back. I know it's been hard, your wife missing Miami. How long have you been separated?
You know about that?
You're only earning 4% more than you were in 2012. We can do better.
I... I have been looking to make a change.
Sorry.
